outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility expected. Negative GEX across 0DTE (-0.86B), WEEKLY_1 (-0.53B), and MONTHLY_1 (-1.18B) indicates dealers are short gamma. Price movements will be amplified by dealer hedging. Watch for acceleration below support levels.
outlook.summary: Extreme bearish positioning with PCR >2.0 and smirk skew (1.31-1.45) across all expiries. Negative total GEX creates volatile conditions where dealer hedging amplifies moves. Max Pain cluster at 605-607 acts as magnetic attractor near spot. 600 PUT RESONANCE (201K+ OI across 4 expiries) is critical structural support. High volume/OI ratio on 610 CALL (9.5x) indicates aggressive dealer hedging activity. Expect mean reversion toward Max Pain if 600 holds; acceleration below triggers volatility cascade.

levels.motivazione: Near-spot resistance with extreme volume/OI ratio (9.5x) indicating aggressive dealer hedging. Mixed put/call structure across 0DTE, WEEKLY_1, and MONTHLY_1 creates friction zone.
0DTE Max Pain within 0.3% of spot. Primary dealer target for options expiry. Strong magnetic attraction with negative GEX amplifying reversion potential.
Max Pain cluster across WEEKLY_1 and MONTHLY_1 (605.0). Significant put OI with dealer gamma support. First structural support below spot.
RESONANCE across 4 expiries with 201K+ combined OI. Most critical structural support. 0DTE volume/OI 1.56x indicates active positioning. Break below triggers volatility cascade.
WEEKLY_1 dominant put wall with 62,963 OI. Secondary support below 600 resonance. Bearish skew (1.45) reinforces level importance.
MONTHLY_1 major put concentration with 105,743 OI. Deep structural support with multi-expiry alignment.
0DTE major put wall with 54,690 OI. High IV (38.4%) indicates fear pricing. First line of deep defense.
RESONANCE across 5 expiries with 85K+ combined call OI. Major structural resistance. WEEKLY_2 Gamma Flip at 629.5 adds confluence.
MONTHLY_1 dominant call wall with 46,275 OI. Upper boundary of resistance zone. Low IV (16.1%) indicates cheap upside.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Moderate volatility expected. Mixed GEX profile - short-term neutral/negative, long-term positive. Reverse smirk skew in monthly tenors supports bullish bias but extreme low PCR signals crowded long positioning.
outlook.summary: Price extended at 6830.71, trading above all visible option activity (6490-6700). Monthly structure shows strong bullish sentiment with reverse skew and extremely low PCR (0.09-0.16). Multi-expiry support concentrated at 6500-6700 zone. Caution warranted for mean reversion despite bullish structure - positioning appears crowded.

levels.motivazione: Highest volume strike in both WEEKLY_1 (75 vol) and WEEKLY_2 (70 vol). Primary support zone below spot with multi-week dealer positioning. First line of defense.
Highest 0DTE volume cluster (271 vol) creates strong intraday gamma attraction. Secondary support with active day-trade hedging interest.
RESONANCE across ALL 5 expiries with consistent activity. MONTHLY_2 OI (79) provides structural weight. Major multi-timeframe support confluence.
RESONANCE with massive MONTHLY_2 OI (954) creates institutional anchor. Active in 0DTE (40), WEEKLY_2 (21). Deep structural support level.
